title: Laptop Refresh - Finance Dept
justification: Replace aging 5-year-old laptops for 25 Finance team members to support the new ERP rollout and improve productivity.

title: Conveyor System Maintenance
justification: Preventive maintenance contract for warehouse conveyor systems to reduce unplanned downtime and ensure operational continuity.
aiAuditNotes: Request covers standard preventive maintenance. Budget aligns with industry norms for conveyor systems. Recommend approval subject to vendor certification verification.

title: AutoCAD License Renewal
justification: Annual renewal of 40 AutoCAD LT licenses for Engineering team. Includes training workshops to ensure full utilization of new features.
aiAuditNotes: License acquisition is cost-effective compared to perpetual licensing model. Training component improves ROI. No compliance concerns identified.

title: Ergonomic Office Chairs - Open Space
justification: Replacement of 7-year-old chairs with ergonomic models to reduce employee sick days and comply with workplace health regulations.
aiAuditNotes: Request is ergonomically justified and compliant with workplace regulations. Budget timing may be a concern given current cost-reduction initiatives.

title: Data Center Server Expansion
justification: Expand data center capacity with 4 new servers and rack infrastructure to support Q3 project workloads and disaster recovery requirements.
aiAuditNotes: Capacity expansion justified given projected workload growth. Vendor quotes should be compared with at least two alternatives. Consider cloud-burst options for peak loads.

title: Production Line Sensor Upgrade
justification: Upgrade proximity sensors on production lines 3 and 4 to reduce false-positive stops and improve throughput by an estimated 12%.

title: Cloud Backup Service Renewal
justification: Annual renewal of cloud backup contract for critical business systems. Includes expanded storage tier and disaster recovery failover testing.
aiAuditNotes: Renewal is routine and cost is consistent with prior contract. Cloud backup is critical infrastructure. No compliance concerns.

title: Electric Forklift Fleet Lease
justification: Lease of 2 electric forklifts to replace diesel units. Reduces fuel costs by ~30% and meets EU emissions compliance deadline effective 2027.
aiAuditNotes: Fleet upgrade aligns with EU emissions compliance requirement. TCO analysis shows 18% saving vs. diesel over the lease period. Recommend approval.

title: Conference Rooms AV Upgrade
justification: Upgrade AV equipment in 3 main conference rooms to support hybrid meetings. Current equipment is incompatible with the new video collaboration platform.

title: CNC Machine Toolset - Line 7
justification: Full toolset for the new CNC machining center on production line 7. Required before line goes live in Q2 2026.
aiAuditNotes: CNC tooling is a capital necessity for the new production line. Pricing is within market range. Compliance requirements for precision tooling are met.
